channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: SpaceX is reportedly getting ready to go public as early as June
item.description: Reuters reported that SpaceX could make the initial announcement by next Wednesday.

item.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
item.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

item.title: One month out from the World Cup, and scammers are already targeting fans — here's what to look out for
item.description: Be careful when entering business partnerships, especially if they're asking for deposits ahead of the World Cup.

item.title: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok settle suit over harm to students
item.description: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok have settled the first lawsuit of its kind, alleging that social media addiction has cost public schools massive amounts of money, according to Bloomberg. The suit, filed by the Breathitt County School District in Kentucky, claims that social media has disrupted learning and created a mental health crisis, straining budgets. The […]...

item.title: I went inside FIFA's secret World Cup lab, and the 3D scanning tech I found there could change football forever
item.description: A rare behind-the-scenes visit to FIFA HQ in Zurich reveals the AI and 3D technology that will change the World Cup — and football — forever.

item.title: Analogue 3D's latest update lets you save whenever you want
item.description: No more frustrating deaths in between save points.

item.title: Amazon's Memorial Day sale feels like Prime Day — up to 63% off Fire TV Sticks, Ring Doorbells, Echo, Blink cameras, and more
item.description: Amazon's Memorial Day sale feels like Prime Day, with up to 60% off best-selling devices like Fire TV Sticks, Ring Doorbells, Echo speakers, and more.

item.title: ‘Spatial intelligence shouldn’t require a GPU': This tiny chip could turn skinny Aviators into smart glasses without a bulky battery - and they'll even understand the world in real-time
item.description: Mosaic reveals new perception chip that gives smart glasses real-time environmental awareness and more.

item.title: Engadget review recap: Razr Fold, Bose Lifestyle Ultra Speaker, Ultrahuman Ring Pro and more
item.description: A roundup of recent reviews published by Engadget.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix de ce tracker Bluetooth passe-partout avec cette réduction de 30 %
item.description: Avec son anse pour y glisser un porte-clé, le Tile Pro est un petit traceur à accrocher partout pour moins de 30 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: A popular academic journal is coming down hard on AI-generated submissions
item.description: ArXiv will be issuing one-year bans to authors caught submitting AI work.
